proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0, x4: T0, x5: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or not x0(x4, x5) or x0(x1(x2, x4), x1(x3, x5)) } = respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x1) }[A](kernel_relation[A, B](f), A.add)
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A, k1: A, k2: A) { kernel_relation[A, B](f, w0, k0) and kernel_relation[A, B](f, k1, k2) and not kernel_relation[A, B](f, w0 + k1, k0 + k2) } }
let w1: A satisfy { exists(k3: A, k4: A) { kernel_relation[A, B](f, w0, w1) and kernel_relation[A, B](f, k3, k4) and not kernel_relation[A, B](f, w0 + k3, w1 + k4) } }
